scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix blockchain && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.deploy-local: cd blockchain && npx hardhat run scripts/deployEverything.js --network localhost
scripts.deploy-sepolia: cd blockchain && npx hardhat run scripts/deployEverything.js --network sepolia
scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run start-backend" "npm run start-frontend"
scripts.dev-local: npx concurrently "npm run start-node" "npm run start-backend" "npm run start-frontend"
